notes: Works well, but fps is lower then it must be. DO NOT change settings in game - that's will affect performance. For example: if you played well on height settings on 60-40 FPS and then switch to medium or low - you'll get like 20-40 FPS on ANY settings. One more thing: do not minimize window when in fullscreen - controls stop working.
systemInfoNotes: CPU actual speed is 2.89. Steam parse value from /sys that is not accurate.
title: Get To The Orange Door

notes: Runs perfectly fine, however didn't give platinum due to issues with alt-tabbing and general wonkiness with closing the application along with randomly decided when it'd take input and when it wouldn't. Once you get going it works perfectly fine for the rest of the play session though.
title: Get To The Orange Door
